data_type_evidence: value_evolution.py:22 — core preferences initialized with np.random.randn(feature_dim, action_dim)
value_evolution.py:26-28 — context preferences generated with np.random.randn(feature_dim, action_dim) * 0.3
value_evolution.py:92-94 — InteractionEnvironment creates ValueEvolutionSimulator for each user with synthetic random preferences
run_experiment.py:97-104 — InteractionEnvironment initialized with synthetic parameters (num_users=50, feature_dim=20, action_dim=10)
No real datasets (CIFAR, HumanEval, torchvision, datasets.load_dataset) are used anywhere in the codebase
All data is generated via numpy random distributions and stochastic preference evolution simulation
